reasoning: The control CP-9-d focuses on protecting the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of system backups. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state and secrets, is encrypted and backed up. Additionally, Kubernetes secrets should be encrypted at rest to protect their confidentiality. Audit logging is also relevant to ensure integrity and traceability of operations affecting backups.
title: System Backup - Protect the confidentiality, integrity, and...
